zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Barton於1382年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德時，她的父親JOHN DE BARTON I43歲，母親Emmote de Thornborough41歲。她於大約1400年與Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire在英國英格蘭波克夏史利文哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年在英國林可爾史爾霍蘭 芬享年33歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州薩默塞特薩默塞特 堂史普赫斯本德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Barton于1382年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德时，她的父亲JOHN DE BARTON I43岁，母亲Emmote de Thornborough41岁。她于大约1400年与Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire在英国英格兰波克夏史利文哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年在英国林可爾史爾霍蘭 芬享年33岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州薩默塞特薩默塞特 堂史普赫斯本德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English bere or bær ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’, i.e. an outlying grange. Compare Barwick . The name is also found in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as de Bartún.

Polish (Bartoń); Czech and Slovak (mainly Bartoň): from a pet form of the personal name Polish Bartłomiej, Czech Bartoloměj, Slovak Bartolomej, from Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Barwick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Berwick or Barwick, for example in Northumberland, Norfolk, Somerset, and Yorkshire, from Old English bere ‘barley’ + wīc ‘outlying farm building’, i.e. a granary lying some distance away from the main settlement.
North German: habitational name from a place called Berwick, near Soest, in Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Barton was born in 1382, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, JOHN DE BARTON I, was 43 and her mother, Emmote de Thornborough, was 41. She married Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire about 1400, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1415, in Holland Fen, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Husband, Somerset Township, Somerset, Pennsylvania, United States.

Elle a épousé Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire environ 1400, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1415, à Holland Fen, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Husband, Somerset Township, Somerset, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

Sie hat um 1400 in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Lei sposato Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire circa 1400, nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Bartonが1382年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで生まれた時，父JOHN DE BARTON Iは43歳，母Emmote de Thornboroughは41歳であった。約1400年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムでSir Henry Fowler of Berkshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホーランド フンで33歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ソメルセトソメルセト トウンシュイップハスバンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Barton(이)가 1382년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 JOHN DE BARTON I(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmote de Thornborough(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 링코실르 홀랜드 펜에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 서머세트 서머세트 타운시프 후스반드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire aproximadamente 1400, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.< Courtyard next to husband: хусбанд, сомирсет тоуншип, сомирсет, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Barton родилась в 1382 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени JOHN DE BARTON I было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Emmote de Thornborough, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire около 1400 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1415 г. в местности холланд фен, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности хусбанд, сомирсет тоуншип, сомирсет, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.
